title: Phase 32.4 — Authority Reality Audit: What Google Rewards on QFINHUB
content_type_google_rewards: BLOG — Despite having only 2 blogs in top 20, the $20K loan blog dominates with 149 impressions (26.4% of all top-20 impressions). The blog is the ONLY content type generating meaningful impression volume.
what_is_NOT_rewarded: Calculators — 5 in top 20 but all at positions 74-85 (far beyond click range). Tax calculator has 105 imp at pos 85 — irrelevant.
Tools — 10 in top 20 but all are noindexed variant pages at positions 5-9. They get impressions but CANNOT be clicked (noindex).
Decisions — Only 1 in top 20 at pos 50.4. Too deep to matter.
Scenarios — ZERO Phase 32 scenario pages have impressions. 0% presence.
Hubs — /all-pages has 13 imp at pos 5.3 but it's a sitemap page, not a content page.
the_real_question: The blog generates impressions. But it generates ZERO clicks. 149 impressions at position 10.6 with 0 clicks means either (a) the snippet is not compelling, or (b) the query is informational and users get answers from featured snippets without clicking.
verdict: Google currently rewards the blog for impressions but NOT for clicks. No other content type has proven click-generation capability. Phase 32 scenario pages have zero data — they are too new to evaluate.
